def test_01_index_page_load(self):
        """IX-01: 首页加载 — 轮播图、活动位、热销正常渲染"""
        page = IndexPage(self.mini)
        loaded = page.wait_loaded()
        self.assertTrue(loaded, '首页加载超时')
        self._screenshot('01_index_loaded')

        title = page.get_nav_title()
        self.assertIn('川着', title, f'导航标题异常: {title}')

        has_banner = page.has_banners()
        self.assertTrue(has_banner, '首页无轮播图')
